description: Sync your SpeakPen voice summaries into your vault as Markdown notes. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: SpeakPen
manifest.description: Sync your SpeakPen voice notes into your vault as Markdown, with AI summaries and transcripts.
manifest.name: SpeakPen Sync

name: SpeakPen Sync

releases.author: xnjiang
releases.description:
SpeakPen Sync 0.1.1 — community store submission release.

- Sync your SpeakPen voice notes into your Obsidian vault as Markdown, with AI summaries and transcripts.
- manifest: minAppVersion 1.4.0, authorUrl added.
- Adds versions.json for store compatibility.

Assets: main.js, manifest.json, versions.json (as required by the Obsidian community plugin guidelines).

releases.author: xnjiang
releases.description:
Initial release of SpeakPen Sync plugin.

- Sync SpeakPen voice summaries as Markdown notes
- Auto sync on configurable interval
- Manual sync via ribbon icon and command palette
- Status bar with last sync time
